title: Emma's Colorful Feelings
synopsis: Emma learns about different feelings and how her family helps her understand and manage her emotions throughout the day.

pages.text: Emma woke up feeling happy! The sun was shining and birds were singing. She jumped out of bed with a big smile.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks jumping out of bed with arms raised, surrounded by bright yellow sunshine swirls and golden happy energy radiating around her bedroom
illustration.alt: Happy Emma jumping out of bed surrounded by yellow sunshine colors

pages.text: But when Emma couldn't find her favorite teddy bear, she felt sad. Tears started to fall down her cheeks.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks looking around her messy room with tears, blue raindrops falling around her and sad blue clouds swirling in the background
illustration.alt: Sad Emma looking for her teddy bear with blue rain colors around her

pages.text: When her little brother broke her puzzle, Emma felt angry. Her face turned red and she stomped her feet.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks stomping her feet with clenched fists, surrounded by swirling red angry spirals and jagged orange lightning bolts in the background
illustration.alt: Angry Emma stomping with red swirls around her

pages.text: Mommy hugged Emma tight. 'It's okay to feel angry,' she said. 'Let's take deep breaths together.'

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks being hugged by her mother, with the red angry swirls slowly changing to calming green and purple peaceful waves around them
illustration.alt: Emma getting a hug from mommy with colors changing from red to calm green

pages.text: Daddy helped Emma find her teddy bear under the couch. The sad blue feelings floated away as Emma smiled again.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks hugging her teddy bear while daddy kneels beside her, blue sad rain transforming into cheerful yellow and pink bubbles floating upward
illustration.alt: Emma finding her teddy bear with daddy as sad blue colors turn to happy colors

pages.text: At bedtime, Emma felt loved and safe. All her feelings were okay, and her family was always there to help.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks tucked in bed surrounded by her family, with warm golden, pink, and lavender love hearts floating gently around the peaceful bedroom scene
illustration.alt: Emma in bed with family surrounded by warm loving colors

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: How did Emma feel when she woke up?
questions.explanation: Emma felt happy when she woke up because the sun was shining and birds were singing!

questions.question: What made Emma feel sad?
questions.explanation: Emma felt sad when she couldn't find her favorite teddy bear.

questions.question: Who helped Emma when she felt angry?
questions.explanation: Mommy hugged Emma and helped her take deep breaths when she felt angry.

questions.question: Where was Emma's teddy bear hiding?
questions.explanation: Daddy helped Emma find her teddy bear under the couch.
